text: Zoe Brown tested user experience with laser-like focus, determined to create something truly innovative. Yet, Zoe Brown couldn't help but steal glances at Remy Waterman, who was now working just a few feet away. Remy Waterman's and Zoe Brown's eyes met again, and this time, a smile passed between Remy Waterman and Zoe Brown.
context: This excerpt describes Zoe Brown's experience at a tech hackathon, focusing on her work and growing attraction to another participant, Remy Waterman.
